title: Sign up and access the workspace
description: A new user can create an account with email and password and is granted access to the authenticated workspace.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the signup form
Verify the user gains access to the authenticated workspace
Verify the dashboard is displayed

title: Log in and reach the dashboard
description: A returning user can sign in with email and password and arrive at the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify the dashboard overview is displayed

title: Blocked access to the dashboard when signed out
description: An unauthenticated user who opens the dashboard is redirected or blocked from viewing purchase data until they sign in.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify access to the dashboard is denied for a signed-out user
Verify the user is prompted to authenticate

title: Open the dashboard as an authenticated user
description: An authenticated user can open the main dashboard and see the central overview of purchase records.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the receipts overview is displayed
Verify the purchases overview is displayed
Verify the warranties overview is displayed

title: Reach login from the landing page
description: A visitor can navigate from the landing page to the sign-in experience using the app's primary entry path.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to sign in
Verify the login form is displayed

title: Reach signup from the landing page
description: A visitor can navigate from the landing page to the account creation experience using the app's primary entry path.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to create an account
Verify the signup form is displayed

title: Show validation when login credentials are incomplete
description: Submitting the login form without required credentials shows validation and does not grant dashboard access.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Submit the login form
Verify a password validation error is visible
Verify the dashboard is not displayed

title: Show validation when signup email is missing
description: Submitting the signup form without an email shows validation and keeps the user on the signup page.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/signup
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the signup form
Verify an email validation error is visible
Verify the signup form remains available

title: Show the empty dashboard state when no records exist
description: An authenticated user with no purchase records sees an empty or initial dashboard state instead of broken content.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify the dashboard shell is displayed
